data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a virtual queue option, specifically the ability to take a number remotely and arrive when close. However, the evidence does not include any API responses or state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for a virtual queue option, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating how this requirement is satisfied or any specific endpoints that validate this functionality.
gaps: No evidence of the virtual queue option functionality being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the virtual queue option requirement.
